# VALIDATION.md -- trust gate (auto-generated by `openmucf.validate`)

Engine reproduction of the pre-registered targets in `openmucf/data/validation_targets.csv` (see `PRE_REGISTRATION.md`).
Operating point for sticking-controlled checks: **T=300 K, phi=1.2, c_t=0.5** (canonical liquid).

| target | observed | predicted | tolerance | verdict | note |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V_kouchen_base | 112.6 (fed omega_s_eff=0.557%) | 114.5 | +-10% | PASS | collision-only baseline |
| V_kouchen_best | 156.5 (fed omega_s_eff=0.308%) | 160.3 | +-10% | PASS | best external-field scenario |
| V_petitjean | 113 (fed omega_s_eff=0.45%) | 130.5 | [100,150] | PASS | measured liquid effective sticking |
| V_yamashita_lcT | monotone X_mu(T) rise | 125.3 | monotone | PASS | X_mu(200,400,600,800 K)=[111.1, 116.7, 121.2, 125.3] |
| V_breunlich_lambdac | 1.45e8 s^-1 (max measured cycling rate, liquid; Breunlich 1989) | 143822639.2 | +-30% | PASS | engine-implied cycling rate at (300 K, 1.2 phi, c_t=0.5), inverted from the closed form; inherits the formation-scale anchor (see gate rule) |
| V_faifman_peak | 7.1e9 s^-1 @ 0.423 eV (Fujiwara 2000) | 7099990898.1 | +-25% | PASS | anchor-consistency check: the F=1 peak amplitude IS the inserted measured value (validates the resonance-model construction, not independent physics) |
| V_nagamine_trend | solid D-T (5-16 K): cycling rises & losses fall as T falls (RIKEN-RAL) | n/a | qualitative monotone | DEFERRED | DEFERRED: v1 is a thermalized gas/liquid model; solid-phase condensed-matter formation is Phase-3 scope (pre-registered in PRE_REGISTRATION.md) |

**Summary: 6 pass, 1 deferred (honest placeholder limits), 0 fail.**

Gate rule: a target passes only within its pre-registered tolerance; deferred items are documented limitations of the v1 model, not silent passes. No input was tuned to hit a validation target, with one disclosed anchor: the formation model's overall scale (`formation._CALIB`) is set to the room-temperature thermal rate (see formation.py), so yield-level targets at 300 K are not fully independent of that anchor; the monotone-rise shape and the beam-resonance energy are.
